name: textbridge
description: Cross-platform text translation client with Windows-first system text capture and write-back.

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:renderer && npm run typecheck:electron
scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k -n renderer,electron-ts,electron -c green,blue,magenta "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:watch:electron" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 nodemon --watch dist-electron --ext js --exec electron .
